canonical_definition: WildSeek is an evaluation dataset of 100 topic-and-intent examples across 24 domains used to assess open-domain long-form generation.
papers: Personality Vector: Modulating Personality of Large Language Models by Model Merging
Refusal-Aware Red Teaming: Exposing Inconsistency in Safety Evaluations
